subcodes.first_line: My spirit be a sacrifice for Thy love! The servant hath indeed perceived the fragrance of utterance from the garment of Thy manifest words which tell of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی لحبکم الفداء قد وجد الخادم عرف البیان من قمیص کلماتکم الظاهره الحاکیه عن
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
